name: library-management-backend
description: Backend API for a university library management system.

scripts.report:all: python3 scripts/generate_report.py && textutil -convert docx output/doc/library_management_report.rtf -output output/doc/library_management_report.docx && cupsfilter output/doc/library_management_report.txt > output/pdf/library_management_report.pdf

author: Codex
